@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# ptz_action_server
+Action server interface for common PTZ cameras and PTU devices

data.author: jmastrangelo-cpr
data.message: rename file and add environment variables to set ptz limits

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+# Defaults for common Axis dome cameras
+# -170 to 170 pan
+# 0 to 90 tilt
+# 1-24x zoom (expressed as 1-9999 in the REST API)
+min_pan: $(optenv AXIS_PTZ_MIN_PAN -2.9670597283903604)
+max_pan: $(optenv AXIS_PTZ_MAX_PAN 2.9670597283903604)
+min_tilt: $(optenv AXIS_PTZ_MIN_TILT 0.0)
+max_tilt: $(optenv AXIS_PTZ_MAX_TILT 1.5707963267948966)
+min_zoom: $(optenv AXIS_PTZ_MIN_ZOOM 1)
+max_zoom: $(optenv AXIS_PTZ_MAX_ZOOM 9999)
+min_logical_zoom: $(optenv AXIS_PTZ_MIN_LOGICAL_ZOOM 1)
+max_logical_zoom: $(optenv AXIS_PTZ_MAX_LOGICAL_ZOOM 24)

@@ -1,12 +0,0 @@
-# Defaults for common Axis dome cameras
-# -170 to 170 pan
-# 0 to 90 tilt
-# 1-24x zoom (expressed as 1-9999 in the REST API)
-min_pan: -2.9670597283903604
-max_pan: 2.9670597283903604
-min_tilt: 0.0
-max_tilt: 1.5707963267948966
-min_zoom: 1
-max_zoom: 9999
-min_logical_zoom: 1
-max_logical_zoom: 24

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
   <arg name="cmd_topic" default="/axis/cmd" />
   <arg name="status_topic" default="/axis/state" />
   <arg name="act_ns" default="/axis" />
-  <arg name="limits_config" default="$(find axis_ptz_action_server)/config/limits_dome.yaml" />
+  <arg name="limits_config" default="$(find axis_ptz_action_server)/config/limits.yaml" />
   <arg name="camera_name" default="ptz_camera" />
   <arg name="publish_joint_states" default="true" />
